title: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Save visualizations to a dashboard**: You can now save Genie Space visualization outputs to a dashboard. See [Save a visualization to a dashboard](/aws/en/genie/talk-to-genie#save-to-dashboard).
* **Reference previous visualizations**: Select and reference visualizations from previous prompts in follow-up prompts.
* **Genie Code for metric view export**: Use Genie Code when exporting metric views from a Genie Space to refine the metric view definition. See [Export a Genie Agent as a metric view](/aws/en/genie/set-up#export-metric-view).
* **Common question prioritization fix**: Author-defined common questions now take priority on the new chat page. Auto-generated common questions appear when there aren't enough author-defined ones.
* **Declarative Automation Bundles (DABs) support**: You can now define and deploy Genie Spaces as Declarative Automation Bundles resources. See [Declarative Automation Bundles resources](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/resources).

ref_links.text: Save a visualization to a dashboard
Export a Genie Agent as a metric view
